---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Enter '...'
3. Tap '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Device info

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Device | e.g. Pixel 8 |
| Android version | e.g. 14 |
| App version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| Issue area | App / Widget / Both |

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem (network setup, target device being woken, etc.).
